name: Charlton Aria Acquisition Corporation Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: Charlton Aria Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on identifying businesses that can benefit from access to the public markets and the operational experience of its management team. The company is sponsored by Aria Capital Group.
